prompt: What's a native Kannada word for 'democracy'? I want the DNS Bhat style — no Sanskrit borrowings.

assertions.name: contains-morphological-breakdown
assertions.description: Output explains the component roots (ಮಂದಿ=people, ಆಳ್ವಿಕೆ=rule)

assertions.name: no-sanskrit-borrowing
assertions.description: Output does NOT use ಪ್ರಜಾಪ್ರಭುತ್ವ (Sanskrit democracy term)

assertions.name: includes-eke-romanization
assertions.description: Output includes Eke romanization alongside Kannada script
